backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Raj Empire Esports backend, implementing user profiles, tournaments, registrations, support tickets, OTP management, social links, and terms & conditions with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and MixinStorage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: applying a red-orange gradient theme across the entire frontend UI, and adding a Panel Links section on the home page with links to both user and admin panels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's role, covering pages, components, hooks, and global styles in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Raj Empire Esports' and loading Google Fonts (Rajdhani, Orbitron, Saira Condensed) alongside the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that creates the TanStack Router with all application routes (home, player register/login/dashboard, admin login/dashboard, terms) and wraps the app in AuthProvider and AdminAuthProvider contexts.
frontend/src/components/AdminProtectedRo: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to /admin if isAdminAuthenticated is false, otherwise renders its children.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component displaying the brand logo, quick navigation links via useNavigate, and social media icons (YouTube, Instagram, Telegram) fetched from the backend via useGetSocialLinks.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with a red-orange gradient brand logo, desktop and mobile navigation, and auth-aware actions (login/logout/dashboard) using useAuth and useNavigate.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main page layout component with a dark background, rendering a Header, Footer, and a router Outlet for child routes.
frontend/src/components/PaymentModal.tsx: Modal component for tournament registration that handles payment screenshot upload, terms acceptance, and submission via the useRegisterForTournament mutation, showing a success state on completion.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the player login page, otherwise renders its children.
frontend/src/context/AdminAuthContext.ts: Provides admin authentication context with hardcoded credentials, persisting auth state in localStorage and exposing login/logout functions.
frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx: Provides player authentication context, persisting the player session (mobile, displayName, bgmiPlayerId) in localStorage with login and logout functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login status, identity state, and session persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including fetching tournaments and registrations, and mutations for creating tournaments, uploading QR codes, updating statuses, and managing room details.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system, and provides brand gradient and scrollbar utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Full-featured admin dashboard with a collapsible sidebar and tabbed sections for managing tournaments, registrations, players, terms & conditions, support tickets, and social links. Uses React Query hooks and admin auth context for data fetching and access control.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page with username/password form, show/hide password toggle, and redirect to dashboard on successful authentication via AdminAuthContext.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Player-facing dashboard with tabs for browsing tournaments, viewing personal registrations, and viewing profile. Includes registration eligibility checks and a PaymentModal for tournament sign-ups.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public landing page featuring a hero section with tournament counts, feature highlights, and navigation links to the player and admin panels.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Two-step player login page that generates an OTP via the backend actor and verifies it, then stores the player session and redirects to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Multi-step registration page (details → OTP → success) that collects display name, mobile, and BGMI Player ID, verifies via OTP through the actor, then registers the player and logs them in.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Displays Terms & Conditions content fetched from the backend (with a hardcoded fallback), rendering numbered sections with alternating colored headings using a rainbow-bar styled card layout.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentsPage.tsx: Lists all BGMI tournaments with status-based filtering tabs, displays tournament cards with slot/prize info, and opens a PaymentModal for registration when a tournament is selected.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a red-orange brand theme with custom OKLCH colors, gradient backgrounds, brand box shadows, gaming fonts (Rajdhani/Exo 2), and accordion/pulse animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for Raj Empire Esports tracking schema version, existing features (red-orange gradient theme, panel links section), and pending feature requests for the Admin and User panels.
